source_message: GXNQ label 2026-06-11: Tuesday 09 June. HTF 1H bearish, 4H bearish, Daily mixed. Price action quality Good. A+ bearish Inversion. 5M confirmation candle close. Entry at 09:50 candle close 29,731.25, stop 29,851.50, TP1 29,302.50, TP2 28,779.00 PWL.

bundle must include 09:54 ET confirmation candle for entry validation

bundle must prove TP1 29302.50 is untaken liquidity below at entry time

as_of_engine_evidence.note: As-of ICT evidence bridge for the GXNQ-labeled 09:50 5m-close bearish Inversion: the live engine table was captured 2026-06-11, so future-mutated rows are not trusted for this decision. The violated bullish 5m FVG (candle1 09:35 H 29730.75 / candle3 09:45 L 29759.75, created at the 09:45 candle close) was inverted by the 09:50 5m candle closing 29731.25 through the full zone. Zone identity, stop anchor (high of 09:49 = 29847; GXNQ placed stop 29851.50 = anchor + discretionary buffer), entry timing convention, and trade shape CONFIRMED by GXNQ at hand-grade 2026-06-11.

fvgs.evidence_note: Bearish iFVG for the labeled short; stop anchor is the 09:49 ET m1 high (29847), confirmation is the 09:50 5m candle close (= 09:54 m1 close, 29731.25).

notes: Second GXNQ-labeled real-session target; first SHORT.
GXNQ's placed stop was 29851.50 = 4.5 points above the structural 09:49 high (29847). The machine asserts the structural anchor high; the buffer is discretionary sizing, not structure.
HTF context per GXNQ: 1H bearish, 4H bearish, Daily mixed. Pillar 2 quality Good.
Do not use later candles to repair the 09:54 decision.
Hand-graded and confirmed by GXNQ on 2026-06-11: zone 29730.75-29759.75, structural stop anchor 29847, entry 29731.25, TP1 29302.50. Frozen.
